message.content:
Explore the NexusAI project at C:\Users\User\nexus-ai thoroughly. I need to understand:

1. The full purpose of the SaaS (what problem it solves)
2. The complete user journey from landing page to using features
3. All major features and how they connect

Focus on:
- src/app/ (all pages and routes)
- src/components/ (key UI components)
- src/lib/ (business logic, API routes)
- Landing page content (pricing, features described)
- Database schema (what data is stored)
- API routes (what backend actions exist)

Read the key files and provide a comprehensive summary of:
- What the SaaS does
- Who it's for
- The step-by-step user journey
- Each feature in detail (DocAI, FeedbackAI, Surveys, Templates, Analytics, Billing)
- How the AI features work (OpenAI integration)

content.text: I'll conduct a thorough exploration of the NexusAI project. Let me start by understanding the directory structure and then systematically examine the key files.

content.text: Now let me read the main project files to understand the structure:

content.content:
1→This is a [Next.js](https://nextjs.org) project bootstrapped with [`create-next-app`](https://nextjs.org/docs/app/api-reference/cli/create-next-app).
     2→
     3→## Getting Started
     4→
     5→First, run the development server:
     6→
     7→```bash
     8→npm run dev
     9→# or
    10→yarn dev
    11→# or
    12→pnpm dev
    13→# or
    14→bun dev
    15→```
    16→
    17→Open [http://localhost:3000](http://localhost:3000) with your browser to see the result.
    18→
    19→You can start editing the page by modifying `app/page.tsx`. The page auto-updates as you edit the file.
    20→
    21→This project uses [`next/font`](https://nextjs.org/docs/app/building-your-application/optimizing/fonts) to automatically optimize and load [Geist](https://vercel.com/font), a new font family for Vercel.
    22→
    23→## Learn More
    24→
    25→To learn more about Next.js, take a look at the following resources:
    26→
    27→- [Next.js Documentation](https://nextjs.org/docs) - learn about Next.js features and API.
    28→- [Learn Next.js](https://nextjs.org/learn) - an interactive Next.js tutorial.
    29→
    30→You can check out [the Next.js GitHub repository](https://github.com/vercel/next.js) - your feedback and contributions are welcome!
    31→
    32→## Deploy on Vercel
    33→
    34→The easiest way to deploy your Next.js app is to use the [Vercel Platform](https://vercel.com/new?utm_medium=default-template&filter=next.js&utm_source=create-next-app&utm_campaign=create-next-app-readme) from the creators of Next.js.
    35→
    36→Check out our [Next.js deployment documentation](https://nextjs.org/docs/app/building-your-application/deploying) for more details.
    37→

content.text:
Perfect! Now I have a comprehensive understanding. Let me compile the final summary based on all the information I've gathered.

## Comprehensive NexusAI SaaS Overview

Based on my thorough exploration of the NexusAI codebase, here's a complete analysis:

---

## 1. **What NexusAI Does - The Core Problem & Solution**

**NexusAI** is an **AI-powered document processing and feedback analysis platform** that solves two critical business problems:

1. **Manual Document Processing** - Companies waste time manually extracting data from PDFs, invoices, contracts, receipts, and scanned documents
2. **Overwhelming Customer Feedback** - Analyzing hundreds of survey responses manually is time-consuming and insights are hard to extract

**The Solution**: NexusAI provides two integrated AI modules:
- **DocAI**: Automated document data extraction using GPT-4o Vision
- **FeedbackAI**: Survey creation and AI-powered feedback analysis

---

## 2. **Who It's For**

- **Operations Managers** - Processing invoices, contracts, receipts
- **Product Teams** - Collecting and analyzing customer feedback
- **Customer Success Teams** - Understanding customer sentiment at scale
- **SMBs to Enterprise** - Flexible pricing from Free to Enterprise ($99/month)

---

## 3. **Complete User Journey (Step-by-Step)**

### **Stage 1: Discovery & Signup**
1. User lands on homepage (`/`) - sees hero section highlighting AI vision + feedback analysis
2. Browses features section describing DocAI and FeedbackAI capabilities
3. Reviews pricing page (Free, Pro $29/mo, Enterprise $99/mo)
4. Clicks "Get Started" or "Sign Up"

### **Stage 2: Authentication**
- **Sign Up** (`/signup`):
  - Enter full name, email, password
  - Option to sign up with Google OAuth
  - Email confirmation required
  
- **Login** (`/login`):
  - Email/password or Google OAuth
  - Forgot password recovery available

### **Stage 3: Organization Setup**
- Account created with free tier by default
- User linked to organization (1 user = 1 org per free tier)
- Profile created with organization_id

### **Stage 4: Dashboard Orientation**
- Lands on `/dashboard` - sees:
  - 4 stats cards: Documents Processed, Active Surveys, Responses Collected, AI Analyses
  - Recent documents section
  - Recent surveys section
  - All showing "0" and "No data yet" prompts

### **Stage 5A: DocAI - Document Processing Flow**
1. **Navigate to Documents** (`/dashboard/documents`)
2. **Upload Documents** (`/dashboard/documents/upload`):
   - Drag-and-drop or click to upload
   - Accepts: PDF, PNG, JPG, TIFF, WebP
   - See upload progress bars
   - File automatically triggers `/api/documents/process`
   - AI extracts data while user waits
   - Processing status: pending → processing → completed/failed

3. **View Results** (`/dashboard/documents/[id]`):
   - See extracted data with confidence scores
   - View processing time
   - Option to export extracted data (CSV, Excel, JSON on Pro+)

4. **Optional - Create Templates** (`/dashboard/templates`):
   - Define custom extraction fields (invoice, contract, receipt, custom)
   - Add field types: text, number, date, currency, boolean
   - Mark fields as required
   - Reuse templates across documents
   - Edit/delete templates

### **Stage 5B: FeedbackAI - Survey & Analysis Flow**
1. **Navigate to Surveys** (`/dashboard/surveys`)
2. **Create Survey** (`/dashboard/surveys/create`):
   - Enter title and description
   - Add questions using Survey Builder component
   - Question types: open-ended, single-choice, multiple-choice, rating (1-5), NPS (0-10), yes/no
   - Toggle required flag per question
   - Configure survey settings:
     - Anonymous responses (yes/no)
     - Allow multiple responses (yes/no)
     - Thank you message
   - Save as draft or publish immediately

3. **Share Survey** (`/dashboard/surveys/[id]`):
   - Copy public survey link: `https://app.com/s/[surveyId]`
   - Share via email, Slack, social, embed on website
   - Track share metrics

4. **Collect Responses** (Public page: `/s/[surveyId]`):
   - Anonymous user lands on survey
   - Sees progress bar as they answer questions
   - Renders different question types (text areas, radio buttons, checkboxes, rating scales, NPS)
   - Validates required fields
   - Shows thank you message after submit
   - Response saved to `survey_responses` table

5. **View Responses & Analyze** (`/dashboard/surveys/[id]`):
   - **Responses Tab**: View all submitted responses with timestamps
   - **Charts Tab**: Auto-generated charts for each question type
   - **Analysis Tab**: 
     - Click "Run AI Analysis" button
     - Calls `/api/surveys/[id]/analyze` endpoint
     - GPT-4o analyzes all responses
     - Shows comprehensive report:
       - **Executive Summary** - AI-generated overview
       - **Sentiment Distribution** - Pie chart of positive/neutral/negative
       - **NPS Score** - If NPS questions included
       - **Key Themes** - Auto-detected topics with counts, sentiment, example quotes
       - **Recommendations** - AI-generated action items

### **Stage 6: Settings & Billing**
- **Settings** (`/dashboard/settings`)
  - API Keys (`/dashboard/settings/api-keys`) - Manage API access (Pro+)
  - Team Management (`/dashboard/settings/team`) - Invite team members
  - Billing (`/dashboard/settings/billing`)

- **Billing** (`/dashboard/settings/billing`):
  - Shows current plan + monthly cost
  - Usage tracker: documents processed / quota, surveys created / quota
  - Progress bars for quota usage
  - Upgrade buttons (free → pro/enterprise)
  - Stripe checkout integration
  - Manage billing portal (existing customers)

---

## 4. **All Major Features in Detail**

### **Feature 1: DocAI - Intelligent Document Processing**

**What it does:**
- Upload any document (PDF, image, scan)
- AI extracts structured data automatically
- Works with: invoices, contracts, receipts, forms, receipts

**Key Capabilities:**
- **Smart Upload**: Drag-drop interface with progress tracking
- **AI Extraction**: Uses GPT-4o Vision to extract data with confidence scores
- **Custom Templates**: Define extraction fields per document type
- **Export Anywhere**: CSV, Excel (Pro+), JSON (Pro+)
- **Status Tracking**: Pending → Processing → Completed/Failed
- **Processing Metrics**: Shows processing time in seconds

**Database Tables:**
- `documents`: file_name, file_url, status, extracted_data, processing_time_ms
- `extraction_templates`: name, description, fields, category, is_default
- Template fields store: name, type, description, required flag

**API Endpoints:**
- `POST /api/documents/upload` - Upload file to storage + create db record
- `POST /api/documents/process` - Trigger AI extraction via GPT-4o
- `POST /api/documents/export` - Export extracted data

---

### **Feature 2: FeedbackAI - Survey Builder & Analysis**

**What it does:**
- Create professional surveys in minutes
- Collect responses from customers/users
- AI automatically analyzes feedback

**Key Capabilities:**
- **6 Question Types**:
  - Open-ended (text)
  - Single-choice (radio buttons)
  - Multiple-choice (checkboxes)
  - Rating (1-5 stars)
  - NPS (0-10 scale)
  - Yes/No
- **Survey Settings**: Anonymous toggle, multiple responses, thank you message
- **Public Link Sharing**: Unique URL per survey
- **Response Collection**: Stores answers in `survey_responses` table
- **Auto Analysis**: Sentiment, themes, NPS calculation, recommendations

**Database Tables:**
- `surveys`: title, description, questions array, status (draft/active/closed), settings
- `survey_responses`: answers (JSON object per question), respondent_email, metadata
- `analyses`: results (sentiment, themes, recommendations), model_used

**API Endpoints:**
- `GET /api/surveys` - List user's surveys
- `POST /api/surveys` - Create new survey
- `POST /api/surveys/[id]/public` - Get public survey data
- `POST /api/surveys/[id]/responses` - Submit survey response
- `POST /api/surveys/[id]/analyze` - Run AI analysis

---

### **Feature 3: Templates - Reusable Document Extraction**

**What it does:**
- Save document extraction patterns for reuse
- Define fields once, apply to multiple documents

**Categories**: Invoice, Contract, Receipt, Custom

**Fields per Template:**
- Field name, type (text/number/date/currency/boolean)
- Description, required flag

---

### **Feature 4: Analytics & Insights**

**For Documents:**
- Processing time tracking
- Extraction accuracy (confidence scores)
- Usage tracking (documents/month limit)

**For Surveys:**
- Response count tracking
- Sentiment analysis (positive/neutral/negative percentages)
- Theme detection with example quotes
- NPS score calculation
- Recommendations generation

---

### **Feature 5: Team & Organization Management**

**Organization Features:**
- Org name, slug
- Member roles: Owner, Admin, Member
- Subscription plan tracking
- Usage quota tracking (documents, surveys)

**Limits by Plan:**
- **Free**: 10 docs/mo, 5 surveys, 5 analyses/mo, 1 user, 3 templates, CSV export
- **Pro**: 200 docs/mo, 50 surveys, 100 analyses/mo, 5 users, 20 templates, CSV+Excel+JSON, API access
- **Enterprise**: Unlimited docs/surveys/analyses, 25 users, unlimited templates, all export formats + API

---

### **Feature 6: Billing & Stripe Integration**

**Payment Integration:**
- Stripe checkout for upgrades
- Monthly or yearly billing
- Subscription management via Stripe Portal
- Webhook handling for subscription events

**Pricing Details:**
- Free: $0 (fully functional)
- Pro: $29/month or $278/year
- Enterprise: $99/month or $950/year

**File Upload Limits by Plan:**
- Free: 5MB per file
- Pro: 25MB per file
- Enterprise: 50MB per file

---

## 5. **How AI Features Work (OpenAI Integration)**

### **Document Extraction Flow**

```
User uploads PDF/Image
  ↓
File stored in Supabase Storage
  ↓
Document record created in DB (status: pending)
  ↓
POST /api/documents/process called
  ↓
File downloaded & converted to Base64
  ↓
GPT-4o Vision API called with:
  - Image as base64
  - System prompt: "You are a document extraction specialist"
  - Custom prompt with template fields (if template selected)
  - Response format: JSON only
  ↓
AI extracts data with confidence scores
  ↓
Results stored in DB (status: completed)
  ↓
User sees extracted fields with confidence % on detail page
```

**Key Implementation** (`src/lib/openai.ts`):
- Uses OpenAI client library v6.25.0
- Model: `gpt-4o` (GPT-4 with Vision)
- Temperature: Default (0.7)
- Max tokens: 4096
- Image detail: "high" quality processing

### **Feedback Analysis Flow**

```
Survey created with questions
  ↓
User shares survey link
  ↓
Responses collected (1+ responses minimum)
  ↓
User clicks "Run AI Analysis"
  ↓
POST /api/surveys/[id]/analyze called
  ↓
All survey responses fetched from DB
  ↓
Responses formatted as text: "Q: [question] A: [answer]"
  ↓
GPT-4o called with analysis prompt
  ↓
Analysis types available:
  - themes: Extract main topics (name, count, sentiment, examples)
  - sentiment: Get positive/neutral/negative percentages
  - summary: Executive summary + key insights
  - full: All of above + recommendations (default)
  ↓
Returns JSON with:
  - summary: string
  - sentiment: {positive, neutral, negative}
  - themes: [{name, count, sentiment, examples}]
  - recommendations: string[]
  - key_insights: string[]
  ↓
Results stored in `analyses` table
  ↓
User sees formatted report with charts
```

**Key Implementation**:
- `analyzeFeedback()` function takes response array
- Runs comprehensive analysis by default
- System prompts guide AI output format
- Response format: JSON object

---

## 6. **Technology Stack**

**Frontend:**
- Next.js 16.1.6 (React 19 with App Router)
- TypeScript 5
- Tailwind CSS 4
- Radix UI components
- React Hook Form + Zod validation
- React Query (TanStack) for data fetching
- Recharts for data visualization
- Lucide icons

**Backend:**
- Next.js API routes
- Supabase (PostgreSQL + Auth + Storage)
- OpenAI API (GPT-4o)
- Stripe API
- Playwright for browser automation (testing)

**Database (Supabase PostgreSQL):**
- `profiles` - User info
- `organizations` - Org subscription + usage
- `organization_members` - Team management
- `documents` - File metadata + extraction results
- `extraction_templates` - Custom fields
- `surveys` - Survey config + questions
- `survey_responses` - Collected responses
- `analyses` - AI analysis results
- `api_keys` - For API access (Pro+)
- `activity_logs` - Audit trail

---

## 7. **Key Database Schema (TypeScript Types)**

```typescript
Document {
  id, organization_id, uploaded_by, file_name, file_url, file_size
  file_type, status (pending/processing/completed/failed)
  extracted_data: { [field]: { value, confidence: 0-1 } }
  template_id, processing_time_ms, created_at
}

Survey {
  id, organization_id, created_by, title, description
  questions: SurveyQuestion[]
  status (draft/active/closed), settings
  response_count, created_at, updated_at
}

SurveyResponse {
  id, survey_id, answers: { [questionId]: value }
  respondent_email, metadata, created_at
}

Analysis {
  id, survey_id, analysis_type, results: AnalysisResults
  model_used (gpt-4o), tokens_used, created_at
}

Organization {
  id, name, slug, stripe_customer_id, stripe_subscription_id
  plan (free/pro/enterprise), plan_period_end
  doc_quota, survey_quota, doc_used, survey_used, created_at
}
```

## 9. **Key Differentiators**

1. **Two-in-one platform** - Document + Feedback in single UI
2. **No code required** - Create surveys with drag-drop builder
3. **AI-powered insights** - Auto-detects themes, sentiment, recommendations
4. **Template reusability** - Save extraction patterns for efficiency
5. **Transparent pricing** - Free tier fully functional, simple paid tiers
6. **Public survey links** - Share via any channel (no login needed to respond)
7. **Real-time feedback** - Responses show up immediately with charts

---

This is a **modern, well-architected SaaS** with clean separation of concerns: frontend (Next.js), backend (API routes), database (Supabase), AI (OpenAI), and payments (Stripe). The user journey is intuitive with clear value props at each stage.
